title: Luxury Fashion Store
description: A premium Shopify Plus store featuring custom checkout extensions, 3D product viewers, and seamless internationalization. Achieved 40% increase in conversion rate.

title: Multi-Vendor Marketplace
description: A complex WooCommerce marketplace with 500+ vendors, custom vendor dashboards, commission tracking, and advanced product filtering. Built custom plugins for vendor fulfillment.

title: Inventory Management App
description: A Shopify app for real-time inventory synchronization across multiple locations. Features barcode scanning, automated reorder alerts, and detailed analytics dashboard.

title: Organic Beauty Brand
description: A conversion-optimized WooCommerce store with subscription capabilities, personalized product recommendations, and engaging micro-animations powered by GSAP.

title: Subscription Box Plugin
description: A comprehensive WooCommerce plugin enabling subscription box businesses. Features flexible billing cycles, box customization, and automated fulfillment integrations.

title: Creative Agency Portfolio
description: An award-winning portfolio site featuring complex scroll animations, WebGL transitions, and a custom CMS. Showcases the agency's work through immersive storytelling.
